title: ActiveCampaign vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels in advanced automation and CRM integration, while Sendinblue offers a generous free tier and strong transactional email capabilities. This guide compares their features, pricing, and performance to help you choose the right tool.
choose_a_if: You need advanced automation workflows and lead scoring capabilities
Your business requires a tightly integrated CRM with email marketing
You're willing to pay for premium features and don't need a free tier
choose_b_if: You want to start with a generous free tier before upgrading
You prioritize transactional email and SMS messaging
You're looking for the most cost-effective entry point into email marketing

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign offers superior automation and lead scoring, making it better for complex marketing workflows. Sendinblue excels at transactional email and offers better value for beginners with its free tier. Choose based on your priorities.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is cheaper overall due to its free tier offering 300 emails/day and support for 100,000 contacts at no cost. ActiveCampaign has no free tier and starts at $15/month, but includes more advanced features. For budget-conscious startups, Sendinblue wins.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export and import. You can migrate your contact lists, though automation workflows and complex configurations will need to be recreated in ActiveCampaign. Plan for some setup time during the transition.
